chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 228 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.651/2022 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case 13.01.2023 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner, through instant petition, seeks directions to respondents No.2 to 4, who are Police officials, to arrest the nominated absconding accused in Crime No.27 of 2020, registered at Police Station Jarwar, under Sections 302, 324, 147, 148, 337-H, P.P.C. It is an admitted position that proceeding under Sections 87 & 88, Cr.P.C. against the absconding accused have already been conducted. The grievance of the petitioner is that the absconding accused persons have not been arrested and their immovable properties have not been attached by the trial Court. Needless to mention here that after conducting proceedings under Sections 87 & 88, Cr.P.C. absconding accused is declared as “Proclaimed Offender” and his movable or immovable property may be attached. If any property owned by the absconding accused is in the knowledge of the complainant, he may approach to trial Court appropriately for attaching the same under relevant provisions. Accordingly, this Constitutional Petition, being not maintainable, is dismissed in limine along with pending application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
